hero.title: Art Like You've Never Experienced It
hero.subtitle: 4,000 years of art history in one immersive experience. Cinematic storytelling, the music of each era, and interactive tools that transform how you learn.
hero.exploreGlobe: Click the globe to explore museums

narrative.title: Cinematic Storytelling
narrative.description: Every lesson is a story with characters, conflict, and emotional stakes. Not just facts—lived experiences.

music.title: Art + Music Connection
music.description: Discover the profound relationship between every art movement and its musical equivalent.

timeline.title: Interactive Timeline
timeline.description: 4,000 years of art in one visual journey. Filter by region, movement, or artist.

compare.title: Visual Comparison Tool
compare.description: Compare two artworks side-by-side with deep dives into technique, color, and context.

ai.title: AI Guide
ai.description: An intelligent companion that answers your questions throughout each lesson.

gamification.title: Learn Through Play
gamification.description: Daily streaks, unlockable levels, challenges, and certificates for every era you master.

levels.title: From Zero to Connoisseur
levels.subtitle: A clear path from your first masterpiece to mastering art history

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: No prior knowledge needed. We start with the world's most iconic works.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description: You know the basics. Dive into movements and artist connections.

enthusiast.name: Enthusiast
enthusiast.description: You've mastered multiple periods. Analyze technique, influence, and historical context.

connoisseur.name: Connoisseur
connoisseur.description: Advanced level. Critical debates, comparative analysis, and certification.

cta.title: Start Your Art Journey Today
cta.subtitle: Free. No credit card. In your language.
